judge_text:
<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "6, ['Request for detailed mental health service usage such as therapy frequency, counseling sessions, or wellness app subscriptions', 'Mention of daily usage-based concierge services pricing (€100/day)', 'Reference to premium membership or loyalty discount program (15% premium membership)', 'Adjustment or calibration of wellness programs based on expatriate adaptation or cultural wellness', 'Bundle or multi-policy discount structures (e.g., 10% multi-policy, family consolidation discount)', 'Specific item coverage values (e.g., electronics up to €1000) not captured as numeric limit fields per item type']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "14, ['Health insurance plan options with plan_name, plan_type, monthly_cost, coverage_tier, and deductible details', 'Mental health coverage including family therapy, psychiatry, stress management, and wellness programs', 'Property insurance coverage including replacement value, electronics, temporary accommodation, and natural disaster protection', 'Travel insurance coverage with business protection, medical evacuation, and emergency coordination', 'Telemedicine inclusion', 'Gym reimbursement', 'Global coverage indicator', 'Concierge services availability (as service_features.concierge_services)', 'Quality rating or premium tier levels (basic, standard, premium)', 'Family coverage for spouse and children', 'Cost breakdown including total monthly and annual cost', 'Premium medical network addon (specialized_coverage.premium_medical_network_addon)', 'Wellness program inclusion (wellness_programs_included)', 'Request for confirmation of pre-existing conditions and health-related usage (information_requests.health_assessment_needed)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 6, ['Request for detailed mental health service usage such as therapy frequency, counseling sessions, or wellness app subscriptions', 'Mention of daily usage-based concierge services pricing (€100/day)', 'Reference to premium membership or loyalty discount program (15% premium membership)', 'Adjustment or calibration of wellness programs based on expatriate adaptation or cultural wellness', 'Bundle or multi-policy discount structures (e.g., 10% multi-policy, family consolidation discount)', 'Specific item coverage values (e.g., electronics up to €1000) not captured as numeric limit fields per item type']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 14, ['Health insurance plan options with plan_name, plan_type, monthly_cost, coverage_tier, and deductible details', 'Mental health coverage including family therapy, psychiatry, stress management, and wellness programs', 'Property insurance coverage including replacement value, electronics, temporary accommodation, and natural disaster protection', 'Travel insurance coverage with business protection, medical evacuation, and emergency coordination', 'Telemedicine inclusion', 'Gym reimbursement', 'Global coverage indicator', 'Concierge services availability (as service_features.concierge_services)', 'Quality rating or premium tier levels (basic, standard, premium)', 'Family coverage for spouse and children', 'Cost breakdown including total monthly and annual cost', 'Premium medical network addon (specialized_coverage.premium_medical_network_addon)', 'Wellness program inclusion (wellness_programs_included)', 'Request for confirmation of pre-existing conditions and health-related usage (information_requests.health_assessment_needed)']
